title: CDB Context Package Schema
description: Fail-closed JSON Schema for CDB repo context refresh packages. This schema validates the structure and safety boundaries of context packages before any brain-apply step (#3289). Live-/Echtgeld-claims require explicit LR-SSOT reference. Orders/Fills/Positions/Risk-State records are forbidden. LR remains NO-GO. No productive DB writes. No secrets ingestion.

package_type.description: Fixed value 'context_package' for this schema version.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of package creation.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA at time of package assembly.

validator_ref.description: Path to the canonical validator script.

lr_status.description: Live readiness status. Fixed NO-GO. Only LR-SSOT can change this.

board_stage_is_live_go.description: Board stage must never be interpreted as live-go.

productive_db_writes_allowed.description: No productive DB writes from context packages.

secrets_in_outputs_allowed.description: No secrets may appear in validation outputs.

trading_state_ingestion_allowed.description: No orders, fills, positions, or live risk state ingestion.

record_id.description: Unique record identifier within the package.

record_type.description: Canonical record type. Unknown or unspecified types are blocked.

repo.description: Repository identifier where the source artifact lives.

source_path.description: Relative file path in the source repo.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the source artifact.

source_hash.description: Content hash of the source artifact (e.g. SHA-256 hex). Must be non-empty.

observed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the observation was made.

confidence.description: Confidence level of the record content.

oneOf.description: record_id of the superseded record, if any.

supersedes.description: Optional reference to a previously superseded record.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the record content.

ref.description: Reference identifier (e.g. file path, URL, record_id).

evidence_refs.description: Evidence references supporting the record content.

path.description: Canonical file path that was read.

commit.description: Commit SHA at time of read.

canon_read_evidence.description: Optional evidence of canon file reads supporting this record.

live_or_echtgeld_claim.description: If present, the record makes a live- or echtgeld-related claim. Requires explicit LR-SSOT reference. Absent by default.

lr_ssot_ref.description: Explicit reference to the LR SSOT document (e.g. 'docs/live-readiness/LR-AUDIT-STATUS-2026-03-05.md').
